prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Island). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This statement applies to England as it reflects the principles underpinning the production of official statistics in the UK, ensuring that data is generated in an impartial manner, free from any political influence, which is crucial for maintaining public trust in the statistics.
